---
title: "Film Study Review"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  data_dir: "data/processed/film_study"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

data_dir <- params$data_dir

read_output <- function(name) {
  path <- file.path(data_dir, name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop("Missing required file: ", path, call. = FALSE)
  }
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

tags <- read_output("film_study_tags.csv")
events <- read_output("film_study_events_enriched.csv")
possessions <- read_output("film_study_possessions.csv")
match_features <- read_output("film_study_match_features.csv")
zone_summary <- read_output("film_study_zone_summary.csv")
transitions <- read_output("film_study_event_transitions.csv")
dictionary <- read_output("film_study_data_dictionary.csv")
metadata_path <- file.path(data_dir, "film_study_feature_metadata.json")
metadata_lines <- if (file.exists(metadata_path)) readLines(metadata_path, warn = FALSE) else character()

coerce_logical <- function(x) {
  tolower(as.character(x)) %in% c("true", "1", "t", "yes")
}

events$is_shot <- coerce_logical(events$is_shot)
events$is_goal <- coerce_logical(events$is_goal)
events$is_card <- coerce_logical(events$is_card)
```

# Overview

This private report summarizes tagged match-review data from the local film-study workflow. The outputs are heuristic summaries built from manual event tags and screen-relative click locations.

```{r overview}
overview <- data.frame(
  metric = c(
    "Tagged matches",
    "Tagged events",
    "Heuristic possessions",
    "Tagged shots",
    "Tagged goals",
    "Tagged cards"
  ),
  value = c(
    length(unique(tags$match_key)),
    nrow(tags),
    nrow(possessions),
    sum(events$is_shot, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(events$is_goal, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(events$is_card, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)
overview
```

# Match Features

```{r match-features}
match_features
```

# Event Mix

```{r event-mix}
event_counts <- sort(table(events$event_type), decreasing = TRUE)
barplot(
  event_counts,
  las = 2,
  col = "#2a9d8f",
  border = NA,
  main = "Tagged Events by Type",
  ylab = "Count"
)
```

# Possession Summary

```{r possession-summary}
possessions
```

```{r possession-plot}
if (nrow(possessions) > 0) {
  barplot(
    possessions$possession_duration_seconds,
    names.arg = possessions$possession_id,
    col = "#264653",
    border = NA,
    main = "Possession Duration",
    xlab = "Possession ID",
    ylab = "Seconds"
  )
}
```

# Spatial Zones

```{r zone-summary}
zone_summary
```

# Event Transitions

```{r transitions}
transitions
```

# Sample Tagged Events

```{r sample-events}
sample_events <- events[, c(
  "match_key",
  "event_index",
  "event_type",
  "team_inferred",
  "player",
  "time_seconds",
  "x_zone",
  "y_lane",
  "next_event_type"
)]
sample_events
```

# Data Dictionary

```{r dictionary}
dictionary
```

# Metadata

```{r metadata}
cat(paste(metadata_lines, collapse = "\n"))
```
